content: Yams by JP Simard (github.com/jpsim/Yams) is Swift YAML library. SPM: .package(url: 'https://github.com/jpsim/Yams.git', from: '6.2.2'). Supports Codable via YamsEncoder/YamsDecoder. Built on LibYAML C library (bundled, no external deps). Known issue: C subdependency CYaml can cause missing module errors via swiftc CLI. Linux compatible.
